name: node-minimatch
title: node-minimatch
summary: Convert glob expressions into RegExp objects for Node.js
description:
Convert glob expressions into RegExp objects for Node.js
A pure javascript, not strictly compatible, implementation of fnmatch/glob.
Supports negation, comment, double-star, brace expansion.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-minimatch because Convert glob expressions into RegExp objects for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-minimatch as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-minimatch with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-minimatch --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
